task:
Write the GEPA (Generalized Evolutionary Prompt Augmentation) design document based on the completed requirements. Requirements are at:
- Master: .gid/features/gepa-core/requirements-master.md
- Features 01-09: .gid/features/gepa-core/requirements-01-core-engine.md through requirements-09-events.md

This is a Rust crate (gepa-core) implementing an evolutionary optimization engine for LLM prompt engineering. The design should cover all 9 features: core engine loop, Pareto front, adapter trait, proposers, candidates, state management, configuration, data loading, and events/callbacks.

Follow the draft-design skill: numbered sections, HOW not WHAT, trace every design decision to GOALs/GUARDs. Split into feature-level design docs if total components exceed 8.

transitions.event: Manually marked done — design + implementation completed outside ritual
